$comment: Versioned registry of reason-code dictionaries. The dictionary_hash is bound into every attestation (v1.5.8), so a post-hoc edit to the reasons a borrower was given breaks verification. This registry adds GOVERNANCE on top: it resolves a bound dictionary_hash to a known, lifecycle-managed version, so (1) provenance is provable (which counsel-signed dictionary produced these reasons), and (2) a swap to an UNREGISTERED dictionary is detectable even if that swapped dictionary is internally self-consistent. test/dictionary-governance.test.js asserts the CURRENT lib/schemas/reason-code-dictionary.json computed hash is registered here — so editing the dictionary without registering the new version fails CI, forcing versioning discipline. Statuses: active | superseded | retired.

dictionaries.authority: Loredana C. Levitchi, primary-author contributor to Shadow (2026-06-19)
